**RENEWAL NOTICE**  

To: Northwind Analytics Ltd.  
From: Baltic Freight GmbH  

In response to your notification dated 2026-10-03, we hereby confirm our intention to **renew** the Master Services Agreement, as permitted under clause 11.2 of the Agreement executed on 16 January 2024.  

Pursuant to clause 11.2, this notice is provided in compliance with the 30-day advance notice requirement, with the applicable deadline falling on **(2026-11-02)**. The period is calculated in accordance with Regulation (EEC, Euratom) No 1182/71, as referenced in the original notice.  

The current annual contract value remains **EUR 375,322.49**. Baltic Freight GmbH will proceed with the renewal of the Agreement, effective beyond the current term.  

This notice is issued in accordance with the legal framework outlined in clause 11.2 and supersedes any prior non-renewal intent communicated.
